content: LGPD for legal-conversation SaaS: transcripts of legal leads can contain sensitive data (health, religion, political opinion — Art. 5 II / Art. 11) requiring elevated safeguards: strong encryption at rest/in transit, need-to-know access with audit logs, short retention with secure deletion, legal basis defined per Art. 7/11 (consent alone is fragile; legitimate interest requires LIA). Law firms are generally controllers; the SaaS is operador (processor) — needs contrato de operador, and lawyers' sigilo profissional (Estatuto da OAB) adds duties beyond LGPD. Data subject rights (access, deletion) and ANPD incident reporting must be operational, not just documented. The lead (data subject) typically never consented to third-party processing — terms must make the law firm responsible for lawful basis.
